mapper.select: SELECT s.season_id AS seasonId, s.season_name AS seasonName, s.banner_title AS bannerTitle, s.banner_desc AS bannerDesc, s.food_id AS foodId, s.sub_desc AS subDesc, s.custom_image AS customImage, f.food_name AS foodName FROM seasons s LEFT JOIN food f ON s.food_id = f.food_id WHERE s.season_name = #{season} ORDER BY s.season_id ASC

SELECT s.season_id AS seasonId, s.season_name AS seasonName, s.banner_title AS bannerTitle, s.banner_desc AS bannerDesc, s.food_id AS foodId, s.sub_desc AS subDesc, s.custom_image AS customImage, f.food_name AS foodName FROM seasons s LEFT JOIN food f ON s.food_id = f.food_id WHERE s.season_name = #{season} ORDER BY s.season_id ASC LIMIT 1
